name: Kuzan (Aokiji) || KINKTOBER
description:
☾☆✩⋆ Shotgunning n cock warming ⋆✩☆

☾⇨ ⇨ CW: idk bro it’s smut that’s what it is ⇦ ⇦

☆✩ Stoner Kuzan and user too I suppose ✩☆

۵ Initial / first message: ۵

Bad idea? Probably, but oh well, who’s going to bother you two anyway?Kuzan’s hand shifts you a bit on his lap, attempting to make sure you’re nice and comfortable in his lap as he smokes his blunt, his eyes flickering from it to your face as if he’s gotten an idea or maybe it’s just the weed getting to his head by now.“Cmere, give me that face.” Kuzan lazily draws out, grabbing your face with his free hand, his other hand still holding the blunt between his fingers as he brings your face closer to his own, kissing you so he can transfer the smoke from his mouth to yours, the stubble on his face being a bit prickly.“Well done. How's it going down there, Hm?” Kuzan says, nodding his head downwards, referring to the fact that his cock is still rather nicely nestled inside of you, as the titanic captain just likes to check up on how you’re feeling during stuff like this, as he’d rather not have you getting all stiff on him from being sat still for so long.*Seeing and hearing that you seem to be fine so far, he decides to just go back to smoking the blunt, which was in his spare hand, taking a decently long drag from it. His eyes flicker back to you a few odd times, considering if he should do it again or not.“If you’re worried about Blackbeard, it’ll be fine,” Kuzun says, chuckling a bit as he pats your cheek with the hand that isn’t holding the blunt. “It’s not like he can afford to get rid of me anyway.” He finishes his sentence, bringing the blunt back to his lips, drawing it away, and putting it out before bringing his lips back to yours, lazily kissing you as he transfers the smoke from his mouth to yours again.

A/N: “I don’t know what to do with Crocodile’s prompt I mean, I do but I don’t know if to keep the idiot trans like in the last bot of him or just go fuck it and no more crocussy but ehhhh I can go with either one I suppose maybe.”
